title: OpenAI GPT OSS models now available on Mosaic AI Model Serving
body: Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports OpenAI's [GPT OSS 120B](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#openai-gpt-120b) and [GPT OSS 20B](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#openai-gpt-20b) as Databricks-hosted foundation models. You can access these models using [Foundation Model APIs pay-per-token](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis#token-foundation-apis).
